user.description: Enter the connection details for your GL-INet router

data_description.host: Use the router URL or IP address (for example: http://192.168.8.1).
data_description.password: Provide the same password you use for the router admin interface.
data_description.consider_home: Set how many seconds a client can be offline before it is marked away.

error.unknown: Something went wrong while validating settings

abort.already_configured: This GL-INet router is already set up

data_description.host: Use the router URL or IP address (for example: http://192.168.8.1).
data_description.password: Provide the same password you use for the router admin interface.
data_description.consider_home: Set how many seconds a client can be offline before it is marked away.

scan_wifi.name: Scan WiFi networks
scan_wifi.description: Scan for available WiFi networks to connect in repeater mode.

connect_wifi.name: Connect to WiFi
connect_wifi.description: Connect to an external WiFi network in repeater mode.

disconnect_wifi.name: Disconnect WiFi
disconnect_wifi.description: Disconnect from the current external WiFi network.

get_saved_networks.name: Get saved networks
get_saved_networks.description: Get list of saved WiFi networks for repeater mode.

remove_saved_network.name: Remove saved network
remove_saved_network.description: Remove a saved WiFi network from the router.
